name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m13414 Black】This passport case features coated canvas and calfskin lining, reimagining the Monogram pattern with rainbow tones from artist Takashi Murakami, telling the lively style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration. Card slots and multiple pockets add functional details. 14 x 2.5 x 10 cm (H x W x D)
